# stripe_treasury_financial_account (Resource)

Stripe Treasury provides users with a container for money called a FinancialAccount that is separate from their Payments balance.
FinancialAccounts serve as the source and destination of Treasury’s money movement APIs.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `supported_currencies` (List of String) The currencies the FinancialAccount can hold a balance in. Three-letter [ISO currency code](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html), in lowercase.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `features` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Encodes whether a FinancialAccount has access to a particular Feature, with a `status` enum and associated `status_details`.
Stripe or the platform can control Features via the requested field. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features))
- `metadata` (Map of String) Set of [key-value pairs](https://docs.stripe.com/api/metadata) that you can attach to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format.
- `nickname` (String) The nickname for the FinancialAccount.
- `platform_restrictions` (Attributes) The set of functionalities that the platform can restrict on the FinancialAccount. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--platform_restrictions))

### Read-Only

- `active_features` (List of String) The array of paths to active Features in the Features hash.
- `balance` (Attributes) Balance information for the FinancialAccount (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--balance))
- `country` (String) Two-letter country code ([ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2)).
- `created` (Number) Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.
- `financial_addresses` (Attributes List) The set of credentials that resolve to a FinancialAccount. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--financial_addresses))
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the object.
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `livemode` (Boolean) If the object exists in live mode, the value is `true`. If the object exists in test mode, the value is `false`.
- `object` (String) String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.
- `pending_features` (Set of String) The array of paths to pending Features in the Features hash.
- `restricted_features` (List of String) The array of paths to restricted Features in the Features hash.
- `status` (String) Status of this FinancialAccount.
- `status_details` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status_details))

<a id="nestedatt--features"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features`

Optional:

- `card_issuing` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Toggle settings for enabling/disabling a feature (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--card_issuing))
- `deposit_insurance` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Toggle settings for enabling/disabling a feature (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--deposit_insurance))
- `financial_addresses` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Settings related to Financial Addresses features on a Financial Account (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--financial_addresses))
- `inbound_transfers` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) InboundTransfers contains inbound transfers features for a FinancialAccount. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--inbound_transfers))
- `intra_stripe_flows` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Toggle settings for enabling/disabling a feature (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--intra_stripe_flows))
- `object` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.
- `outbound_payments` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Settings related to Outbound Payments features on a Financial Account (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--outbound_payments))
- `outbound_transfers` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) OutboundTransfers contains outbound transfers features for a FinancialAccount. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--outbound_transfers))

<a id="nestedatt--features--card_issuing"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features.card_issuing`

Required:

- `requested` (Boolean, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Whether the FinancialAccount should have the Feature.

Optional:

- `status` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Whether the Feature is operational.
- `status_details` (Attributes List, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Additional details; includes at least one entry when the status is not `active`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features--card_issuing--status_details))

<a id="nestedatt--features--card_issuing--status_details"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features.card_issuing.status_details`

Optional:

- `code` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Represents the reason why the status is `pending` or `restricted`.
- `resolution` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Represents what the user should do, if anything, to activate the Feature.
- `restriction` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The `platform_restrictions` that are restricting this Feature.

<a id="nestedatt--platform_restrictions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `platform_restrictions`

Optional:

- `inbound_flows` (String) Restricts all inbound money movement.
- `outbound_flows` (String) Restricts all outbound money movement.


<a id="nestedatt--balance"></a>
### Nested Schema for `balance`

Read-Only:

- `cash` (Map of Number) Funds the user can spend right now.
- `inbound_pending` (Map of Number) Funds not spendable yet, but will become available at a later time.
- `outbound_pending` (Map of Number) Funds in the account, but not spendable because they are being held for pending outbound flows.


<a id="nestedatt--financial_addresses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `financial_addresses`

Read-Only:

- `aba` (Attributes) ABA Records contain U.S. bank account details per the ABA format. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--financial_addresses--aba))
- `supported_networks` (List of String) The list of networks that the address supports
- `type` (String) The type of financial address

<a id="nestedatt--financial_addresses--aba"></a>
### Nested Schema for `financial_addresses.aba`

Read-Only:

- `account_holder_name` (String) The name of the person or business that owns the bank account.
- `account_number` (String) The account number.
- `account_number_last4` (String) The last four characters of the account number.
- `bank_name` (String) Name of the bank.
- `routing_number` (String) Routing number for the account.



<a id="nestedatt--status_details"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status_details`

Read-Only:

- `closed` (Attributes) Details related to the closure of this FinancialAccount (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status_details--closed))

<a id="nestedatt--status_details--closed"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status_details.closed`

Read-Only:

- `reasons` (List of String) The array that contains reasons for a FinancialAccount closure.
